description: Creates a highlighted interval on a number line between two points. Supports custom label text.
utility: Visualizes bounded solution sets and closed/open intervals with customizable endpoints, styling, and labels

arguments.name: numberLine
arguments.description: The number line to place the interval on

arguments.name: a
arguments.description: The left endpoint of the interval

arguments.name: b
arguments.description: The right endpoint of the interval

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Endpoint configuration: type(closed), type(open), type(leftopen), type(rightopen). Defaults to closed

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Optional color using c(colorName). Defaults to blue

arguments.name: offset
arguments.description: Optional vertical offset from axis using buff(pixels)

arguments.name: label
arguments.description: Custom label text (replaces auto-generated interval notation)

alternates.description: Interval with both endpoints filled: [a, b]
Interval with both endpoints hollow: (a, b)
Interval [a, b) with left filled, right hollow
Interval (a, b] with left hollow, right filled

alternates.syntax: interval(N, a, b, type(closed), c(blue), "Set A")
alternates.description: Interval with custom label text replacing auto-generated notation

examples.expression: N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); interval(N, 2, 7, type(closed), c(red), buff(10))
N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); I = interval(N, 1, 5, type(closed), c(blue), "Set A")
